title: DAVID — The Script We Can Read but Cannot Understand

notes: Row 6: AI-disclosure obligation planned — verify presence at Pre-Publish.
Social = mass dissemination. Platform AI-label + community guidelines apply.

config.voice_suffix: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @David-001: identical host face, charcoal sweater, Archive desk, brass lamp, same eye-line — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Archive-001: identical Archive interior — floor-to-ceiling manuscript shelves, long wooden worktable, open illuminated codex, cuneiform tablet, rolled papyrus, single brass desk lamp, same shelf blur depth, same eye-line to desk — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation. Host seated at Archive worktable under neutral 5000K ambient key, speaks calmly to camera; motivated desk practical visible on codex surface only. Camera: slow gentle push-in medium. LIGHTING LOCK @Set-Archive-001 (#243): neutral balanced 5000K ambient key on host — natural skin, blue channel intact; soft 5200K shelf bounce ≤25%; motivated desk practical on worktable/codex in desk quadrant only — no warm spill on face, sweater, or shelves; no yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows; no magenta ambient. GENERATION LOCK Archive-neutral (#243): neutral balanced 5000K key at generation — skin midtones R≈G≈B within 8%, blue channel intact (B≥40 mids, B/R≥0.35); wood burnt umber #3D2B1F–#5C4033; parchment cream #F5F0E6; shadow neutral grey #3A3530. Motivated desk practical in lower desk quadrant only — zero warm spill on host face, sweater, or shadows. Forbid yellow-green cast. Forbid blue-starved generation. Forbid magenta cast. Forbid global orange skin push. Motivated practical accent only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host. Lip-synced, delivers: "I am DAVID. Today, Linear A — the writing system of Bronze Age Crete, used by the Minoans from roughly 1800 to 1450 BCE. We can read the signs. We do not understand the language behind them." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame. Opening shot, establish environment slowly.
shots.speech_text: I am DAVID. Today, Linear A — the writing system of Bronze Age Crete, used by the Minoans from roughly 1800 to 1450 BCE. We can read the signs. We do not understand the language behind them.

STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation. Host leans slightly forward, traces finger across open document on desk, engaged with the evidence. Camera: medium — lean into evidence. LIGHTING LOCK @Set-Archive-001 (#243): neutral balanced 5000K ambient key on host — natural skin, blue channel intact; soft 5200K shelf bounce ≤25%; motivated desk practical on worktable/codex in desk quadrant only — no warm spill on face, sweater, or shelves; no yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows; no magenta ambient. GENERATION LOCK Archive-neutral (#243): neutral balanced 5000K key at generation — skin midtones R≈G≈B within 8%, blue channel intact (B≥40 mids, B/R≥0.35); wood burnt umber #3D2B1F–#5C4033; parchment cream #F5F0E6; shadow neutral grey #3A3530. Motivated desk practical in lower desk quadrant only — zero warm spill on host face, sweater, or shadows. Forbid yellow-green cast. Forbid blue-starved generation. Forbid magenta cast. Forbid global orange skin push. Motivated practical accent only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host. Lip-synced, delivers: "Arthur Evans began excavating the palace of Knossos on Crete in 1900 and discovered two distinct scripts in the ruins. He named them Linear A and Linear B — both written on clay tablets by scribes, both using similar signs. Evans never deciphered either. Michael Ventris, an architect with no formal training in linguistics, cracked Linear B in 1952 and announced it on BBC radio. Linear A, the older script, Evans could not read — and neither, seventy years later, can we." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame. Continue from previous shot — same camera direction, smooth motion carry.
shots.speech_text: Arthur Evans began excavating the palace of Knossos on Crete in 1900 and discovered two distinct scripts in the ruins. He named them Linear A and Linear B — both written on clay tablets by scribes, both using similar signs. Evans never deciphered either. Michael Ventris, an architect with no formal training in linguistics, cracked Linear B in 1952 and announced it on BBC radio. Linear A, the older script, Evans could not read — and neither, seventy years later, can we.

Lip-synced, delivers: "The proof of how much we know — and don't know — is in approximately fifteen hundred documents: clay accounting tablets, stone libation tables, inscribed vessels. We recognise numerical notation, we identify commodity ideograms, we even spot recurring sequences that may be place names or deity names. The meanings remain sealed." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame. Continue from previous shot — same camera direction, smooth motion carry.

CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Archive-001: identical Archive interior — floor-to-ceiling manuscript shelves, long wooden worktable, open illuminated codex, cuneiform tablet, rolled papyrus, single brass desk lamp, same shelf blur depth, same eye-line to desk — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation. Host settles back slightly, reflective scholarly mode — hands composed on desk, slight lean back. Camera: medium — slight pullback. LIGHTING LOCK @Set-Archive-001 (#243): neutral balanced 5000K ambient key on host — natural skin, blue channel intact; soft 5200K shelf bounce ≤25%; motivated desk practical on worktable/codex in desk quadrant only — no warm spill on face, sweater, or shelves; no yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows; no magenta ambient. GENERATION LOCK Archive-neutral (#243): neutral balanced 5000K key at generation — skin midtones R≈G≈B within 8%, blue channel intact (B≥40 mids, B/R≥0.35); wood burnt umber #3D2B1F–#5C4033; parchment cream #F5F0E6; shadow neutral grey #3A3530. Motivated desk practical in lower desk quadrant only — zero warm spill on host face, sweater, or shadows. Forbid yellow-green cast. Forbid blue-starved generation. Forbid magenta cast. Forbid global orange skin push. Motivated practical accent only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host. Lip-synced, delivers: "No decipherment of Linear A is accepted by the scholarly community, and claims to the contrary should be treated with scepticism. Proposals connecting the Minoan language to Luwian, to Semitic, or to an unknown Aegean substrate remain unverified. What the Archive preserves here is the shape of our ignorance — the fact that a literate civilization flourished on Crete for four hundred years and we still cannot read what its scribes wrote." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame. Continue from previous shot — same camera direction, smooth motion carry.
shots.speech_text: No decipherment of Linear A is accepted by the scholarly community, and claims to the contrary should be treated with scepticism. Proposals connecting the Minoan language to Luwian, to Semitic, or to an unknown Aegean substrate remain unverified. What the Archive preserves here is the shape of our ignorance — the fact that a literate civilization flourished on Crete for four hundred years and we still cannot read what its scribes wrote.

provenance_card.title: DAVID · The Archive
provenance_card.subtitle: Dead languages, actually pronounced.
provenance_card.footer: Bring the dead tongues back — one attestation at a time. DAVID.
